subject: AAI HELM code transfer
commit_message:
AAI HELM code transfer

- Remove kubernetes/aai code from OOM.
- Add oom/aai as submodule of OOM in kubernetes/aai
location.

Change-Id: I7641a0cd4b0ecef174569c9450b09f2f7c211f44
Issue-ID: CIMAN-250
Signed-off-by: Jessica Wagantall <jwagantall@linuxfoundation.org>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Mike, Jimmy: Please notice that this change is in a test branch "code-transfer"
Currently aai/oom contains all the code being removed here with the history
